items.name: check
items.signature: pub fn check( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check threading patterns in Rust code.

items.name: check_fire_and_forget
items.signature: pub fn check_fire_and_forget( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc:
Check for fire-and-forget spawns — `tokio::spawn(...)` or `thread::spawn(...)`
without a `let` binding on the same line.
